name: Abalone Bio
description: Abalone Bio drives next-generation antibody discovery through its FAST platform, screening hundreds of millions of variants to to fast-track target-activating candidates.

name: Ayrton Energy
description: Ayrton Energy enables practical hydrogen logistics with a first-of-its-kind liquid organic hydrogen carrier (e-LOHC) that safely stores and transports hydrogen at ambient conditions using existing fuel infrastructure.

name: Craft Health
description: Craft Health redefines personalized medicine by 3D printing multi-release pharmaceuticals and nutraceuticals into a single on-demand pill, streamlining R&D through manufacturing workflows.

name: Krosslinker
description: Krosslinker revolutionizes thermal insulation with its patented aerogel platform, pioneering ultra-light, scalable nanomaterials to disrupt cold-chain logistics, fire-resistant coatings, and passive cooling.

name: MEDiC
description: MEDiC unlocks next-generation drug insights by systematically assessing the functional contribution of cancer mutations in human tumor–immune microenvironments, revealing both tumor-intrinsic and immuno-oncology targets.

name: Nabaco
description: Nabaco develops NatuWrap, an innovative edible coating technology that extends the shelf life of fresh produce, reducing food waste while eliminating the need for plastic packaging.

name: Novel Farms
description: Novel Farms develops a novel scaffolding platform and media formulation that enable cost-effective production of cultivated meat at large-scale, accelerating the widespread adoption of this sustainable source of animal protein.

name: Sift Biosciences
description: Sift Biosciences is an AI-driven immunotherapy company using microbial mimicry to retrain infection-educated T cells, turning immune-cold tumors visible and enabling new treatments for cancer and autoimmune disease.
